general_feedback: The added @return description for `constant` accurately captures both key aspects of the returned BooleanProp: its fixed value and the no-op nature of its mutating operations (verified against `ConstantImpl` where `set`, `setValue`, `clear`, `enable`, `disable`, and `toggle` all return constants or do nothing). The wording is concise, follows Scaladoc conventions (lowercase start, consistent with surrounding @return tags), and reads naturally alongside the existing @param descriptions.
